title: iPSC PCR: For Screening Edited Clones

before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"d13hq","text":"Using the extracted gDNA, set up the following PCR and run using the following conditions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bsrp2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cvnih","text":"Each cell line/mutation will require its own unique set of primers. Ensure that you have the appropriate primers for the cell line/mutation before setting up the PCR.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6b0sq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6o5ak","text":"Note: Design primers to amplify approximately a 300-400 bp region for best results.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8a8fn","text":"Please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for information about hazards, and to obtain advice on safety precautions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: This is the set up for a 50 µL reaction. %s %s
After PCR has been set up, run in thermocycler using the following conditions. %s %s
After PCR has been run in thermocycler, it is best to run the sample on a 2% gel to confirm the presence of PCR product.
Pour gel from flask into casting tray (be sure to add appropriate amount of combs to casting tray).
Let sit for 30-40 minutes, or until firm. 00:30:00
Place gel cast into the gel rig apparatus.
Load samples. Be sure to include positive and negative controls when possible.

To make the gel, combine an appropriate amount of Agarose, TBE and Ethidium Bromide using the following guidelines. a. The 2% gel will be cast in one of the following ways: %s %s b. Combine Agarose and TBE in an appropriately sized flask and microwave until Agarose is completely dissolved. Swirl intermittently during heating. c. Once completely dissolved add appropriate amount of Ethidium Bromide to flask and swirl until dispersed evenly.
Place lid on gel rig apparatus.
Run gel at 150 volts for 01:30:00 (checking at 01:00:00 to ensure samples have not run too far or off the gel).
Turn off gel rig apparatus and remove cast.
Blot off excess TBE from cast.
If PCR product is the approrpiate size and concentration as indicated by the gel, use the remaining PCR product to perform restriction digest
creator: Celeste M M. Karch
